mnemonics: SCHAUMS: Structures Classified Hierarchically, Algorithms Underpinning Memory Systems
keyPoints: Schaum's Outline provides a problem-solved approach to understanding data structures
It covers fundamental structures like arrays, linked lists, trees, graphs, and hash tables
The outline emphasizes practical applications and algorithm efficiency analysis
commonMistakes: Focusing only on theory without practicing the numerous solved problems
Confusing the implementation details of similar structures (e.g., stacks vs queues)
Overlooking the time/space complexity analysis for each data structure operation
